_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of credential management systems and software
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of data platform access management processes, including access request intake, provisioning workflows, access review cycles, and deprovisioning procedures.
comments: NICE knowledge intersects with WIDAI DA domain. Knowledge DA-K-016 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DA-K-012 (DA, cosine: 0.470), SP-K-004 (SP, cosine: 0.470).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.1/10 (raw 0.512). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge, management]. NICE-only terms [credential, software, systems] vs WIDAI-only terms [access, cycles, data, deprovisioning, intake, platform] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.887 (P=0.917, R=0.859). P exceeds R by 0.058 — the NICE element's 7 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 19 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: mixed signal (E:0.9%, N:76.5%, C:22.6%). No dominant classification for "Knowledge of credential management systems and software" vs "Knowledge of data platform access management processes, including access request" — the relationship is genuinely ambiguous from a logical inference perspective.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.474 ≈ STS 0.512 (gap 0.038). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [knowledge, management] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 20.0%. Shared tokens: [knowledge, management]. NICE-only: [credential, software, systems]. WIDAI-only: [access, cycles, data, deprovisioning, intake, platform].
